concept.conceptName: Sodium [Moles/volume] in Urine collected for unspecified duration

en.name: Urinary sodium
en.longDescription: ## Definition & Clinical Context Urinary sodium is the concentration of sodium in a urine specimen — typically a spot (random) urine sample [1]. The source data will typically be a single numeric result per patient-timestamp, produced by a biochemistry analyser. Results are reported as a substance concentration in mmol/L (SI unit) or mEq/L; the two are numerically equivalent for sodium [2]. ## Included Concepts The set lists two LOINC "Lab Test" concepts measuring the sodium concentration in a spot urine specimen: - *3003181 / 2955-3 — Sodium [Moles/volume] in Urine (LOINC)*: spot (random) urine sample. Most widely used LOINC code. - *3034249 / 35678-2 — Sodium [Moles/volume] in Urine collected for unspecified duration (LOINC)*: used when the source does not specify whether the sample is spot or timed. **Note on units.** Recommended unit follows LOINC's `EXAMPLE_UCUM_UNITS`: **`mmol/L`** (concept 8753 — millimole per litre). Source systems may report `mmol/L` or `mEq/L`; for sodium (a monovalent cation) the two are numerically equal. ## Excluded Concepts The following LOINC concepts that exist for urinary sodium are deliberately not part of this set, grouped by reason for exclusion. ### Timed urine collections — different specimen (timed vs. spot) - *3014485 / 21525-1 — Sodium [Moles/volume] in 24 hour Urine* - *40760484 / 57370-9 — Sodium [Moles/volume] in 12 hour Urine* - *44816583 / 74685-9 — Sodium [Moles/volume] in 4 hour Urine* - *40760495 / 57382-4 — Sodium [Moles/volume] in 2 hour Urine* - *3004907 / 21526-9 — Sodium [Mass/volume] in 24 hour Urine* ### Excretion rates — different measurand (amount per unit time, not a concentration) - *3002079 / 2956-1 — Sodium [Moles/time] in 24 hour Urine* - *40762087 / 58994-5 — Sodium [Moles/time] in 18 hour Urine* - *3023636 / 18377-2 — Sodium [Moles/time] in 12 hour Urine* - *3015574 / 18376-4 — Sodium [Moles/time] in 6 hour Urine* - *3041697 / 53122-8 — Sodium [Moles/time] in 1 hour Urine* - *3008007 / 21527-7 — Sodium [Mass/time] in 24 hour Urine* - *3024341 / 26763-3 — Sodium [Mass/time] in 2 hour Urine* - *3006990 / 32553-0 — Sodium [Molar amount] in Urine collected for unspecified duration* ### Ratios — different measurand (ratio to another analyte) - *3014208 / 11149-2 — Sodium/Creatinine [Mass Ratio] in Urine* - *3018135 / 13809-9 — Sodium/Creatinine [Mass Ratio] in 24 hour Urine* - *3045687 / 33951-5 — Sodium/Creatinine [Molar ratio] in Urine* - *3044783 / 44405-9 — Sodium/Creatinine [Molar ratio] in 24 hour Urine* - *3047005 / 43223-7 — Sodium/Creatinine [Ratio] in Urine* - *40760099 / 56980-6 — Sodium/Creatinine [Ratio] in 24 hour Urine* - *3037478 / 2959-5 — Sodium/Potassium [Molar ratio] in Urine* - *3046935 / 44406-7 — Sodium/Potassium [Molar ratio] in 24 hour Urine* ### Renal clearance — different measurand (clearance, requires both urine and serum) - *3028085 / 26761-7 — Sodium renal clearance in 2 hour Urine and Serum or Plasma* - *3020988 / 2957-9 — Sodium renal clearance in 24 hour Urine and Serum or Plasma* ### Sodium urate crystals — different measurand (uric acid crystals in urine sediment) - *3965693 / 101734-2 — Sodium Urate crystals [Energy Difference] in 24 hour Urine* - *3965219 / 101826-6 — Sodium Urate crystals [Saturation Fraction] in 24 hour Urine* - *3966197 / 101935-5 — Sodium urate crystals [Energy Difference] in Urine* - *3030374 / 33031-6 — Sodium urate crystals [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy low power field* - *3046391 / 43423-3 — Sodium urate [Saturation Fraction] in 24 hour Urine* - *3041656 / 53129-3 — Sodium urate crystals [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field* - *3040317 / 53788-6 — Sodium urate crystals [Presence] in Urine sediment by Light microscopy* ### Other - *36659714 / 94842-2 — Sodium [Moles/volume] in Urine from Fetus*: fetus specimen, out of scope. ## Mapping Notes - **Default concept** when the source reports "urinary sodium", "urine Na", "spot urine sodium" without further specification: `3003181 / 2955-3 — Sodium [Moles/volume] in Urine`. By far the most common LOINC code. - **Source unit is mEq/L**: numerically equivalent to mmol/L for sodium; no conversion needed. - **Source reports a 24-hour (or other timed) urine collection**: do **not** map to this concept set. Timed urinary sodium is out of scope. - **Source reports a sodium-to-creatinine or sodium-to-potassium ratio**: do **not** map. These are different measurands. - **Do not confuse with**: sodium in blood (separate concept set, "Sodium in blood"), urinary sodium excretion rate (mmol/24h), fractional excretion of sodium (a derived value). ## References [1] Regenstrief Institute. LOINC code 2955-3 — Sodium [Moles/volume] in Urine. Available: https://loinc.org/2955-3/ [2] Nomenclature for Properties and Units (NPU). IFCC/IUPAC. NPU codes (current release). Available: https://npu-terminology.org/npu-database/
